label: Thoth Major Arcana
description: The 22 trumps of Aleister Crowley's Book of Thoth — Crowley/Harris (1944). One agent per card; bios emerge from each card's symbolic meaning. Use agent_count=22.
bio_framing: {name} — a Major Arcana trump from Aleister Crowley's Thoth tarot deck (Crowley/Harris, 1944). Write in first person as this card embodied — its symbolic role, voice, mood, and Hermetic associations — not as a person reading the card.
